title: Mebahel's Creatures - Baby Skeletons
description: Mebahel’s Creatures -  Baby Skeleton  : They may be small... but they shoot just as well.
body:
## 🐺 Partnered with Godlike Host!

I'm proudly partnered with **[Godlike Host](https://godlike.host/minecraft-java-servers-hosting/?aff_id=1302)** — a high-performance game server provider perfect for **Minecraft Java**. 👉 Click the logo above to explore their hosting plans. By using this link, **you support my modding work directly!** *** # 💀 Mebahel’s Creatures: Baby Skeleton _"They may be small… but they shoot just as well."_ This mod adds three new hostile variants: * 👶 **Baby Skeleton** * 🔥 **Baby Wither Skeleton** * ❄️ **Baby Stray** They spawn in place of their vanilla counterparts based on a configurable chance. Each baby variant moves faster and keeps the abilities of its adult form! *** ## 📦 Required Dependencies This mod requires the following on **Fabric or Quilt**: * [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) If you're using **Forge or Neoforge via Sinytra**, install: * [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/sinytra-connector) * [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/ffapi) *** ## ⚔️ Features * 👶 **Baby Skeletons**, **Baby Wither Skeletons**, and **Baby Strays** * 🏹 They spawn with their regular weapons (bow or sword) * 🧊 Baby Strays keep their freezing arrows * 🔥 Baby Wither Skeletons are **immune to fire** * 🏃‍♂️ All babies have **faster movement speed** (configurable) * 🎨 Compatible with vanilla-style **resource packs** *** ## ⚙️ Configurable Settings You can configure spawn chances and speed multipliers in the JSON config file: > `config/mebahels-creatures-baby-skeleton/mebahels_creatures_baby_skeleton_config.json` ``` { "babySkeletonSpawnChance": 5, "babySkeletonSpeedMultiplier": 1.1, "babyWitherSkeletonSpawnChance": 5, "babyWitherSkeletonSpeedMultiplier": 1.1, "babyStraySpawnChance": 5, "babyStraySpeedMultiplier": 1.1 } ``` *** ## 💬 Notes & Credits * 🧪 This mod is **a work in progress** — feedback and ideas are welcome! * 💬 Join our Discord: [https://discord.com/invite/y8uC2NepkB](https://discord.com/invite/y8uC2NepkB) *** ## 🔎 Discover More Mods by Mebahel [![Mebahel's Antique Beasts](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/1071/689/64/64/638607287891334052.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mebahels-antique-beasts) ⚔️ **Mebahel's Antique Beasts** Add epic mythological creatures, weapons, and lore to your Minecraft world. [![Zombie Horde](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/1067/539/64/64/638601866522157802.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mebahels-zombie-horde) 🧟 **Mebahel’s Zombie Horde** Face smarter, faster, and more organized zombies that swarm you at night.
